examples: The Rat went on composedly, picking himself up with a pleasant laugh.
She looked at Jane, to see how she bore it; but Jane was very composedly talking to Bingley.
"It is always like that," said Peter composedly, continuing to peel his stick; "but it is not really fire."
She spoke energetically but composedly, conveying the impression that she had spent a great deal of time preparing for the event because it was extremely important to her.
